fetch.comment: JS web-fetch server. Set enabled:true + MCP_ENABLED=true to activate.

search.comment: Brave Search web search. Requires BRAVE_API_KEY env var.

filesystem.comment: File read/write sandboxed to MCP_FS_ROOT (defaults to repo root). Write tools are policy-gated to pro role.

github.comment: GitHub operations. Requires GITHUB_TOKEN with repo/issues scope. Write tools are policy-gated.

supabase.comment: Supabase DB access in read-only mode. Requires SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN (project management token, different from SUPABASE_KEY).
